title: Input Reading, Tokenization, Command Registry, and Dispatch · Failure Repair Bay
summary: A preserved Go Pokedex run contains one plausible command, parsing, URL, JSON, client, cache, ownership, goroutine, cancellation, persistence, security, test, packaging, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in deterministic command parser and injected dispatcher and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Choose bufio.Reader or Scanner from line-size, token, error, cancellation, and testability requirements and configure any explicit limit.
Normalize line endings and whitespace under a documented grammar without corrupting names or silently accepting extra arguments.
Validate required, optional, repeated, missing, and extra arguments before handler access and return actionable usage.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Pokedex Go Reader Choice
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 4522 during an accessible regional field-guide session. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile line admission, argument validation, registry lookup, and deterministic dispatch; browser code must remain deterministic and side-effect-free; then change one toolchain, target, artifact, migration, rollback, or restore condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose bufio.Reader or Scanner from line-size, token, error, cancellation, and testability requirements and configure any explicit limit.

Inspect the Pokedex Go Reader Choice trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Pokedex Go Dispatch Evi…
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: pokedex-go-dispatch-evidence-13or6l" that uses case 7862 to reconcile line admission, argument validation, registry lookup, and deterministic dispatch. Keep defaults runnable and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact PokéAPI, read or write host files, handle real terminal or OS signals, spawn unbounded work, or claim race, leak, load, accessibility, cross-platform, package, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, original fixtures, controlled RoundTrippers and httptest servers, race and fuzz runs, temporary files, subprocess and signal harnesses, inspected artifacts, representative platforms, accessibility review, capacity, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Pokedex Go Dispatch Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Pokedex Go Dispatch Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go team handles case 8383 during a race-instrumented cache stress case. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile line admission, argument validation, registry lookup, and deterministic dispatch; all goroutines, bodies, signals, timers, and files require named cleanup ownership; then change one toolchain, target, artifact, migration, rollback, or restore condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test blank, known, aliased, unknown, malformed, EOF, and read-error cases with injected streams and exact outputs.

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test blank, known, aliased, unknown, malformed, EOF, and read-error cases with injected streams and exact outputs.
